race.comment: SHE'S ASTUNNERARCH (12) was in the firing line on the bend and progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over 1590m at Wangaratta after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Finds a suitable race and can get the job done. OVERPRICED (7) progressed nicely last time out to finish just one length from the winner in second over 1614m at this track. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. NGONGOTAHA (6) has been improving with each run and looks suited out in trip. Interesting that SIGMA BOY (8) is on debut at 1628m, because his past couple of trials have been at only 800m, but they've been good, he's by Castelvecchio and from a yard that knows what its doing.
